content:
Given an undirected dynamic graph with the edges [(1, 2, 1), (1, 3, 1), (1, 2, 5), (3, 1, 6)], what nodes are linked with node 1 at time 1?
Answer: [2]

Given an undirected dynamic graph with the edges [(2, 5, 0), (4, 6, 2), (6, 8, 3), (2, 4, 4), (6, 7, 4), (1, 3, 5), (1, 6, 5), (3, 7, 5), (1, 8, 6), (6, 9, 6), (8, 9, 7), (3, 5, 8), (1, 2, 9), (3, 6, 9), (5, 7, 9)], what nodes are linked with node 3 at time 8?
Answer: [6, 7, 8]
